title: v1.1 Maintenance Milestone — Roadmap Doc Only
description: Create docs/roadmap.md documenting the v1.1 maintenance milestone features: drift-check (doc-code drift detection — no mainstream tool in 2026, deferred to v1.1), fab migrate (schema migration helper), fab doctor (self-diagnosis command), and Copilot fallback compile (when Copilot MCP reaches GA). This is a documentation-only task — no implementation code. The roadmap should be referenced from the project README. All 4 v1.1 features are explicitly out of scope for the current 7-day MVP implementation.

files.change: Document 4 v1.1 features (drift-check, fab migrate, fab doctor, Copilot fallback compile) with rationale for deferral; trigger conditions for each; no implementation details needed
Project overview (Fabric v2.0 MCP-First Fortified); quick start; link to docs/roadmap.md for future features; 5-layer architecture overview

implementation: Create docs/roadmap.md: document drift-check (deferred because no mainstream doc-code drift tool exists in 2026-04; trigger: v1.1 milestone); fab migrate (schema migration from future agents.meta.json breaking changes); fab doctor (self-diagnosis: check MCP server connectivity, pre-commit hook health, AGENTS.md tree consistency); Copilot fallback compile (trigger: Copilot MCP GA; compile AGENTS.md to .github/copilot-instructions.md)

Create project README.md: Fabric v2.0 overview, installation (pnpm global install), quick start (fab init → fab config install → start Fabric server), link to docs/roadmap.md for v1.1 features; add note that v1.0 = 7-day MVP, v1.1 = maintenance milestone

reference.examples: synthesis.json parked_ideas for v1.1 feature rationale; mcp-first-fabric.md §7 Verdict for scope boundaries; synthesis.json follow_up for research items

criteria: docs/roadmap.md exists and documents all 4 v1.1 features (drift-check, fab migrate, fab doctor, Copilot fallback compile) with trigger conditions for each
docs/roadmap.md is referenced from README.md with a link
No implementation code added for any v1.1 feature (documentation only)

rationale.chosen_approach: Document-only task for v1.1 scope; ensures MVP boundary is clear and future contributors know what is explicitly deferred
alternatives_considered: Skip roadmap entirely (loses traceability for deferred decisions)
Implement partial v1.1 features during MVP (explicitly out of scope per handoff spec)
decision_factors: 7-day MVP timebox; v1.1 features explicitly out of scope per handoff spec constraints
synthesis.json parked_ideas contain rationale for each deferred feature
Documenting trigger conditions helps future contributors know when to revisit
rationale.tradeoffs: Creating README adds a small amount of scope but is essential for project usability and is naturally part of any v1.0 release

manual_checks: Open docs/roadmap.md — must contain sections for all 4 v1.1 features
Open README.md — must contain link to docs/roadmap.md
Verify no new TypeScript or implementation files were added by this task
success_metrics: docs/roadmap.md covers all 4 v1.1 features with trigger conditions
